docket_entries.description: STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION TO PLTF'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WEAR ME APPAREL CORP.
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO WEAR ME APPAREL CORP IS APPROVED. ORDER & JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
